TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cye-te-man-tu, title = Cye-te-man-tu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cye-te-man-tu} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cye-te-man-tu "Ni-pow-al a kamu ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§†ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§°ŗ•Ćŗ§ā Ing a kamu /ňĆk√¶tm√¶n'duňź/, Ni-pow-al a kamu ŗ§Įŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§¨ŗ•Ā, Yen-pu,Yen-pu,Yeng-pu,anucaay Ya-pu", tatenga'ay a ngangan Cye-te-man-tu tabakiay a tukuy han, nu Ni-pow-al a angangan a tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy. duduc tu 2021 a mihcaan tu pulung niasipan, Cye-te-man-tu a tademaw pakala tu 845,767, zuma a tukay liwliway nu muenengay a tademaw iza 290 emang ku tademaw, Cye-te-man-tu katalakaw nu buyu'1400 depah "4,600 Ingdepah" u buyu' amin ku liwliw, tukay u buyubuyu'anay a Cye-te-man-tu hatu dihebdiheban, sapi' ku demiad, "iza singangan tu kapahay "kakalayan a buyu'" han. u Cye-te-man-tu i kitakit nu kasumamadanay simuenengay nu tademaw a tukay, nu makay kasumamadan nu Ni-pow-al a cen-ce-cung-sin atu macakatay nu kahenulan a kalalacal, uyni a tukay i 2 a se-ci malingatu patizeng. tukay kitizaan a diheb i naemekan pangangan han Ni-pow-al-man-tow-low, namahiza Cye-te-man-tu nu Si-ma-lay-ya-san-may-saluay a Ney-wa-al a tademaw nu macakatay nu kahenulan a ziyazu', ayaway a ziday, Cye-te-man-tu nanu Ni-pow-al hungti a kanatal nu angangan a tukuy, sinisanga' tu Ni-pow-al tu nu hungtiay a luma', sakapahay a luma' atu balubaluan. . makay 1985 a mihcaan hawsa, nu Nan-ya kitizaan a makakadum malacabay u kapulungan a kitizaan. ayzaay a ziday, Cye-te-man-tu hatu i 2008 a mihcaan patizeng tu Ni-pow-al kung-he-kow seyhu a kitzaan, nu Pa-ke-ma-ti a kuwan aca tu nu zumaay. Cye-te-man-tu katenes nu mihcaan Ni-pow-al i naemakan, cen-ce keyzay, pasubana', lalangawan a kitizaan nikalahadan, izaw ku nu In-tu kiwkay atu umituhut kiw u angangan kikatuuday ku binacadan a tademaw. liwkuay kawaw nu tukay a kezay nu kahenulan zumaay a nisakaput. . 2013 a mihcaan, Cye-te-man-tu i TripAdvisor hamin nu kitakit caay a bataan nu miliwkuay a kakatayzaan nipasilic a nganngan u sakatulu, i Ya-cow nipasiluc tu ngangan u saayaway. uyni atukay hinisa Ni-pow-al pasayza i Si-ma-la-ya-san a panan nu luma', u tukay yadah ku nu kasumamadanay a naemekan panutek a zaysang nu kitakit. pasu nu Cye-te-man-tu hungti a putah, S-wa-yang-pu-na-te, Man-yen-ta atu Po-su-ti-na-te-myaw, duduc tu nu kitakit a gingku 2010 a mihcaan tu nisulita, Cye-te-man-tu paymihcaan 4% ku kadadawa a macakat, mahini mala Nan-ya nu sadadawaay macakat a tukuy, Ni-pow-al saayaway misuayaw tu kalamkamay masatukay atu masazidayay ayza nipilebu tu tukay, imahini tini Si-ma-la-ya-san-may u satabakiay a tukay. . Cye-te-man-tu naemekan a kitizaan i 2015 a mihca 4 a bulad tu 7.8 a ninelan pihaceng ku kapeci'. zuma a lipatizeng a luma' mapanukas tu, nuzuma mipatizeng henay. i Cye-te-man-tu Tu-pa a putah izaw ku cacay nisanga'an tu nu 12 se-ci a mihcaan tu dudang biyu "pangangan aca tu Cya-sa-man-ta kilang a luma', mu-cen-s" Ing-wen a ngangan "Kasthamandap" uyni kilangay a biyu tulu a tungduh, hamin nisanga'an a luma' cayi' ku pacek atu muking a sapicukal, u hamin cacay dudang a kilang ku nipisanga', sakukamu Cye-te-man-tu a ngangan uyza u makayzaay kuynian akila a biyu. uzuma Cye-te-man-tu mapangangan tu "Kan-ti-pu-al", "Kan-ti" u nipangangan t usen-huy-cisyang-tyen-ni, "pu-al" a imi nu Di'tu kitizaan mueneng, sisa Kan-ti-pu-al paheci tiniay kitizaan mueneng nu Ci-syang-tyan-ni. 723 a mihcaan, Li-ca micaluk tu hungti a ziday mikuwan tu Na-cya-ma-te-wa hungti itini tatenga' patizeng tu tukay, mapangangan ciziza tu Kan-ti-pu-al, imi u "salunganay a tukay". 10 a se-ci Li-ca-wi hungti a ziday itini pahecek tu tukay, u cacay atabakiay a kilang a zayliw sapisanga' tu cacay tulu ku tungduh nu badahung a biyu, miala tu ban a sulit ngangan "Cya-s-te-man-ta-pu" han "Kasthamandap" niyul u Ni-pow-al a kamu tu Cya-s-te-man-tu, imi u "dudang kilang biyu". zikuz a uyni a nisanga'an malu angangan amihayma misanga' tu luma', patahkal palahad, Cya-s-te-man-tu mala tukay tu a ngangan. 10šłĖÁīÄ, "(Kasthamandap), . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu "ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a kamu ******** iŇč a kamu /*k*tm*n Ē~ °du*/, ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a kamu *****, j…ôn-pu,j…ôn-pu,j…ôŇč-pu,anu ¶aaj ja-pu", tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a ŇčaŇčan ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu tabakiaj a tukuj ńßan, nu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a aŇčaŇčan a tukaj atu satabakiaj a tukuj. dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu pur~…ĺuŇč niasipan, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ***,***, zuma a tukaj r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw iza *** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu katar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ °**** d…ôpańß "*,*** iŇčd…ôpańß" u buju Ē~ ° amin ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, tukaj u bujubuju Ē~ °anaj a ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu ńßatu dińß…ôbdińß…ôban, sapi Ē~ ° ku d…ômiad, "iza siŇčaŇčan tu kapańßaj "kakar~…ĺajan a buju Ē~ °" ńßan. u ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu i kitakit nu kasumamadanaj simu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw a tukaj, nu makaj kasumamadan nu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶uŇč-sin atu ma ¶akataj nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ, ujni a tukaj i * a s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu patiz…ôŇč. tukaj kitizaan a dińß…ôb i na…ôm…ôkan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ni-pow-ar~…ĺ-man-tow-r~…ĺow, namańßiza ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu nu si-ma-r~…ĺaj-ja-san-maj-sar~…ĺuaj a n…ô-wa-ar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw nu ma ¶akataj nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a zijazu Ē~ °, ajawaj a zidaj, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu nanu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ nu aŇčaŇčan a tukuj, sinisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sakapańßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan. . makaj **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, nu nan-ja kitizaan a makakadum mar~…ĺa ¶abaj u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kitizaan. ajzaaj a zidaj, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu ńßatu i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč tu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow s…ôńßu a kitzaan, nu pa-k…ô-ma-ti a kuwan a ¶a tu nu zumaaj. ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu kat…ôn…ôs nu mińß ¶aan ni-pow-ar~…ĺ i na…ômakan, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô k…ôzaj, pasubana Ē~ °, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kitizaan nikar~…ĺańßadan, izaw ku nu in-tu kiwkaj atu umituńßut kiw u aŇčaŇčan kikatuudaj ku bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. r~…ĺiwkuaj kawaw nu tukaj a k…ôzaj nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan zumaaj a nisakaput. . **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu i tripad*isor ńßamin nu kitakit ¶aaj a bataan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a kakatajzaan nipasir~…ĺi ¶ a ŇčanŇčan u sakatur~…ĺu, i ja- ¶ow nipasir~…ĺu ¶ tu ŇčaŇčan u saajawaj. ujni atukaj ńßinisa ni-pow-ar~…ĺ pasajza i si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja-san a panan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u tukaj jadańß ku nu kasumamadanaj a na…ôm…ôkan panut…ôk a zajsaŇč nu kitakit. pasu nu ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu ńßuŇčti a putańß, s-wa-jaŇč-pu-na-t…ô, man-j…ôn-ta atu po-su-ti-na-t…ô-mjaw, dudu ¶ tu nu kitakit a giŇčku **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺita, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu pajmińß ¶aan *% ku kadadawa a ma ¶akat, mańßini mar~…ĺa nan-ja nu sadadawaaj ma ¶akat a tukuj, ni-pow-ar~…ĺ saajawaj misuajaw tu kar~…ĺamkamaj masatukaj atu masazidajaj ajza nipir~…ĺ…ôbu tu tukaj, imańßini tini si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja-san-maj u satabakiaj a tukaj. . ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu na…ôm…ôkan a kitizaan i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tu *.* a nin…ôr~…ĺan pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. zuma a r~…ĺipatiz…ôŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mapanukas tu, nuzuma mipatiz…ôŇč ńß…ônaj. i ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu tu-pa a putańß izaw ku ¶a ¶aj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nu ** s…ô- ¶i a mińß ¶aan tu dudaŇč biju "paŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶ja-sa-man-ta kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mu- ¶…ôn-s" iŇč-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan "kastńßamandap" ujni kir~…ĺaŇčaj a biju tur~…ĺu a tuŇčduńß, ńßamin nisaŇča Ē~ °an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aji Ē~ ° ku pa ¶…ôk atu mukiŇč a sapi ¶ukar~…ĺ, u ńßamin ¶a ¶aj dudaŇč a kir~…ĺaŇč ku nipisaŇča Ē~ °, sakukamu ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu a ŇčaŇčan ujza u makajzaaj kujnian akir~…ĺa a biju. uzuma ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu mapaŇčaŇčan tu "kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ", "kan-ti" u nipaŇčaŇčan t us…ôn-ńßuj- ¶isjaŇč-tj…ôn-ni, "pu-ar~…ĺ" a imi nu di Ē~ °tu kitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč, sisa kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ pańß…ô ¶i tiniaj kitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč nu ¶i-sjaŇč-tjan-ni. *** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺi- ¶a mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti a zidaj mikuwan tu na- ¶ja-ma-t…ô-wa ńßuŇčti itini tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tukaj, mapaŇčaŇčan ¶iziza tu kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ, imi u "sar~…ĺuŇčanaj a tukaj". ** a s…ô- ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶a-wi ńßuŇčti a zidaj itini pańß…ô ¶…ôk tu tukaj, u ¶a ¶aj atabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč a zajr~…ĺiw sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj tur~…ĺu ku tuŇčduńß nu badańßuŇč a biju, miar~…ĺa tu ban a sur~…ĺit ŇčaŇčan " ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-ta-pu" ńßan "kastńßamandap" nijur~…ĺ u ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a kamu tu ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-tu, imi u "dudaŇč kir~…ĺaŇč biju". zikuz a ujni a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺu aŇčaŇčan amińßajma misaŇča Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, patańßkar~…ĺ par~…ĺańßad, ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-tu mar~…ĺa tukaj tu a ŇčaŇčan. ****, "(kastńßamandap), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cye-te-man-tu "Ni-pow-al a kamu ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§†ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§°ŗ•Ćŗ§ā Ing a kamu /ňĆk√¶tm√¶n'duňź/, Ni-pow-al a kamu ŗ§Įŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§¨ŗ•Ā, Yen-pu,Yen-pu,Yeng-pu,anucaay Ya-pu", tatenga'ay a ngangan Cye-te-man-tu tabakiay a tukuy han, nu Ni-pow-al a angangan a tukay atu satabakiay a tukuy. duduc tu 2021 a mihcaan tu pulung niasipan, Cye-te-man-tu a tademaw pakala tu 845,767, zuma a tukay liwliway nu muenengay a tademaw iza 290 emang ku tademaw, Cye-te-man-tu katalakaw nu buyu'1400 depah "4,600 Ingdepah" u buyu' amin ku liwliw, tukay u buyubuyu'anay a Cye-te-man-tu hatu dihebdiheban, sapi' ku demiad, "iza singangan tu kapahay "kakalayan a buyu'" han. u Cye-te-man-tu i kitakit nu kasumamadanay simuenengay nu tademaw a tukay, nu makay kasumamadan nu Ni-pow-al a cen-ce-cung-sin atu macakatay nu kahenulan a kalalacal, uyni a tukay i 2 a se-ci malingatu patizeng. tukay kitizaan a diheb i naemekan pangangan han Ni-pow-al-man-tow-low, namahiza Cye-te-man-tu nu Si-ma-lay-ya-san-may-saluay a Ney-wa-al a tademaw nu macakatay nu kahenulan a ziyazu', ayaway a ziday, Cye-te-man-tu nanu Ni-pow-al hungti a kanatal nu angangan a tukuy, sinisanga' tu Ni-pow-al tu nu hungtiay a luma', sakapahay a luma' atu balubaluan. . makay 1985 a mihcaan hawsa, nu Nan-ya kitizaan a makakadum malacabay u kapulungan a kitizaan. ayzaay a ziday, Cye-te-man-tu hatu i 2008 a mihcaan patizeng tu Ni-pow-al kung-he-kow seyhu a kitzaan, nu Pa-ke-ma-ti a kuwan aca tu nu zumaay. Cye-te-man-tu katenes nu mihcaan Ni-pow-al i naemakan, cen-ce keyzay, pasubana', lalangawan a kitizaan nikalahadan, izaw ku nu In-tu kiwkay atu umituhut kiw u angangan kikatuuday ku binacadan a tademaw. liwkuay kawaw nu tukay a kezay nu kahenulan zumaay a nisakaput. . 2013 a mihcaan, Cye-te-man-tu i TripAdvisor hamin nu kitakit caay a bataan nu miliwkuay a kakatayzaan nipasilic a nganngan u sakatulu, i Ya-cow nipasiluc tu ngangan u saayaway. uyni atukay hinisa Ni-pow-al pasayza i Si-ma-la-ya-san a panan nu luma', u tukay yadah ku nu kasumamadanay a naemekan panutek a zaysang nu kitakit. pasu nu Cye-te-man-tu hungti a putah, S-wa-yang-pu-na-te, Man-yen-ta atu Po-su-ti-na-te-myaw, duduc tu nu kitakit a gingku 2010 a mihcaan tu nisulita, Cye-te-man-tu paymihcaan 4% ku kadadawa a macakat, mahini mala Nan-ya nu sadadawaay macakat a tukuy, Ni-pow-al saayaway misuayaw tu kalamkamay masatukay atu masazidayay ayza nipilebu tu tukay, imahini tini Si-ma-la-ya-san-may u satabakiay a tukay. . Cye-te-man-tu naemekan a kitizaan i 2015 a mihca 4 a bulad tu 7.8 a ninelan pihaceng ku kapeci'. zuma a lipatizeng a luma' mapanukas tu, nuzuma mipatizeng henay. i Cye-te-man-tu Tu-pa a putah izaw ku cacay nisanga'an tu nu 12 se-ci a mihcaan tu dudang biyu "pangangan aca tu Cya-sa-man-ta kilang a luma', mu-cen-s" Ing-wen a ngangan "Kasthamandap" uyni kilangay a biyu tulu a tungduh, hamin nisanga'an a luma' cayi' ku pacek atu muking a sapicukal, u hamin cacay dudang a kilang ku nipisanga', sakukamu Cye-te-man-tu a ngangan uyza u makayzaay kuynian akila a biyu. uzuma Cye-te-man-tu mapangangan tu "Kan-ti-pu-al", "Kan-ti" u nipangangan t usen-huy-cisyang-tyen-ni, "pu-al" a imi nu Di'tu kitizaan mueneng, sisa Kan-ti-pu-al paheci tiniay kitizaan mueneng nu Ci-syang-tyan-ni. 723 a mihcaan, Li-ca micaluk tu hungti a ziday mikuwan tu Na-cya-ma-te-wa hungti itini tatenga' patizeng tu tukay, mapangangan ciziza tu Kan-ti-pu-al, imi u "salunganay a tukay". 10 a se-ci Li-ca-wi hungti a ziday itini pahecek tu tukay, u cacay atabakiay a kilang a zayliw sapisanga' tu cacay tulu ku tungduh nu badahung a biyu, miala tu ban a sulit ngangan "Cya-s-te-man-ta-pu" han "Kasthamandap" niyul u Ni-pow-al a kamu tu Cya-s-te-man-tu, imi u "dudang kilang biyu". zikuz a uyni a nisanga'an malu angangan amihayma misanga' tu luma', patahkal palahad, Cya-s-te-man-tu mala tukay tu a ngangan. 10šłĖÁīÄ, "(Kasthamandap), . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

zijazu Ē~ °, ajawaj a zidaj, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu nanu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ nu aŇčaŇčan a tukuj, sinisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sakapańßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan. . makaj **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, nu nan-ja kitizaan a makakadum mar~…ĺa ¶abaj u kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kitizaan. ajzaaj a zidaj, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu ńßatu i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč tu ni-pow-ar~…ĺ kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow s…ôńßu a kitzaan, nu pa-k…ô-ma-ti a kuwan a ¶a tu nu zumaaj. ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu kat…ôn…ôs nu mińß ¶aan ni-pow-ar~…ĺ i na…ômakan, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô k…ôzaj, pasubana Ē~ °, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kitizaan nikar~…ĺańßadan, izaw ku nu in-tu kiwkaj atu umituńßut kiw u aŇčaŇčan kikatuudaj ku bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw. r~…ĺiwkuaj kawaw nu tukaj a k…ôzaj nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan zumaaj a nisakaput. . **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu i tripad*isor ńßamin nu kitakit ¶aaj a bataan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a kakatajzaan nipasir~…ĺi ¶ a ŇčanŇčan u sakatur~…ĺu, i ja- ¶ow nipasir~…ĺu ¶ tu ŇčaŇčan u saajawaj. ujni atukaj ńßinisa ni-pow-ar~…ĺ pasajza i si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja-san a panan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u tukaj jadańß ku nu kasumamadanaj a na…ôm…ôkan panut…ôk a zajsaŇč nu kitakit. pasu nu ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu ńßuŇčti a putańß, s-wa-jaŇč-pu-na-t…ô, man-j…ôn-ta atu po-su-ti-na-t…ô-mjaw, dudu ¶ tu nu kitakit a giŇčku **** a mińß ¶aan tu nisur~…ĺita, ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu pajmińß ¶aan *% ku kadadawa a ma ¶akat, mańßini mar~…ĺa nan-ja nu sadadawaaj ma ¶akat a tukuj, ni-pow-ar~…ĺ saajawaj misuajaw tu kar~…ĺamkamaj masatukaj atu masazidajaj ajza nipir~…ĺ…ôbu tu tukaj, imańßini tini si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja-san-maj u satabakiaj a tukaj. . ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu na…ôm…ôkan a kitizaan i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tu *.* a nin…ôr~…ĺan pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. zuma a r~…ĺipatiz…ôŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mapanukas tu, nuzuma mipatiz…ôŇč ńß…ônaj. i ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu tu-pa a putańß izaw ku ¶a ¶aj nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nu ** s…ô- ¶i a mińß ¶aan tu dudaŇč biju "paŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶ja-sa-man-ta kir~…ĺaŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mu- ¶…ôn-s" iŇč-w…ôn a ŇčaŇčan "kastńßamandap" ujni kir~…ĺaŇčaj a biju tur~…ĺu a tuŇčduńß, ńßamin nisaŇča Ē~ °an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aji Ē~ ° ku pa ¶…ôk atu mukiŇč a sapi ¶ukar~…ĺ, u ńßamin ¶a ¶aj dudaŇč a kir~…ĺaŇč ku nipisaŇča Ē~ °, sakukamu ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu a ŇčaŇčan ujza u makajzaaj kujnian akir~…ĺa a biju. uzuma ¶j…ô-t…ô-man-tu mapaŇčaŇčan tu "kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ", "kan-ti" u nipaŇčaŇčan t us…ôn-ńßuj- ¶isjaŇč-tj…ôn-ni, "pu-ar~…ĺ" a imi nu di Ē~ °tu kitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč, sisa kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ pańß…ô ¶i tiniaj kitizaan mu…ôn…ôŇč nu ¶i-sjaŇč-tjan-ni. *** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺi- ¶a mi ¶ar~…ĺuk tu ńßuŇčti a zidaj mikuwan tu na- ¶ja-ma-t…ô-wa ńßuŇčti itini tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° patiz…ôŇč tu tukaj, mapaŇčaŇčan ¶iziza tu kan-ti-pu-ar~…ĺ, imi u "sar~…ĺuŇčanaj a tukaj". ** a s…ô- ¶i r~…ĺi- ¶a-wi ńßuŇčti a zidaj itini pańß…ô ¶…ôk tu tukaj, u ¶a ¶aj atabakiaj a kir~…ĺaŇč a zajr~…ĺiw sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj tur~…ĺu ku tuŇčduńß nu badańßuŇč a biju, miar~…ĺa tu ban a sur~…ĺit ŇčaŇčan " ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-ta-pu" ńßan "kastńßamandap" nijur~…ĺ u ni-pow-ar~…ĺ a kamu tu ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-tu, imi u "dudaŇč kir~…ĺaŇč biju". zikuz a ujni a nisaŇča Ē~ °an mar~…ĺu aŇčaŇčan amińßajma misaŇča Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, patańßkar~…ĺ par~…ĺańßad, ¶ja-s-t…ô-man-tu mar~…ĺa tukaj tu a ŇčaŇčan. ****, "(kastńßamandap), . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
